items.title: This 1 Simple ETF Could Turn $250 a Month Into $260,400
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM) is a great long-term investment option that focuses on high-yielding dividend stocks, which have historically produced solid returns with less volatility. The fund's diversified portfolio and consistent dividend growth make it a suitable core investment for investors seeking to grow their wealth over time.
